item.title: EU MiCA 18-month transition ends July 1; all platforms serving EU clients must now hold CASP authorisation or cease operations
Six US federal agencies face July 18 statutory deadline to publish final stablecoin rules under the GENIUS Act
ESMA launches first MiCA Common Supervisory Action targeting crypto custodian key management, incident response, and third-party dependencies
Ethical hackers disclose patched Aptos blockchain flaw that could have put $70B in digital assets at systemic risk
US spot bitcoin ETFs snap 10-day outflow streak with $221.7M net inflow, largest single-day total in two months
Q2 2026 spot crypto ETFs logged $4.67B in net redemptions, the largest quarterly outflow since January 2024 launch
Summer.fi automated USDC vaults drained of $6M on July 6 after attacker used $65.4M flash loan to manipulate vault accounting logic
BNY Mellon expands Circle partnership, enabling institutional custody, mint/burn, and settlement of USDC on Ethereum and Solana
Vanguard posts first-ever head of digital assets, reversing its longstanding refusal to engage with crypto products
House Financial Services Committee schedules July 17 hearing to advance Digital Asset Market CLARITY Act granting CFTC spot-market authority
Tokensied real-world assets on-chain surpass $20B; Ethereum holds 54.1% of supply as BlackRock and JPMorgan Treasury settlements go live
Credit Agricole issues EURXT, a MiCA-compliant euro electronic money token, via CACEIS Bank on Ethereum with EUR 20M initially circulated
BlackRock IBIT records $209.4M single-day bitcoin ETF inflow on July 7, largest daily absorption in over a month
New nonprofit Ethereum Institutional launches to guide bank and asset manager on-chain engagement, citing active projects from BlackRock and JPMorgan
